title: draba oreadum subsp. oreadum
intro: Draba oreadum subsp. oreadum is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Brassicaceae, commonly found in mountainous regions. It is often referred to as the "Alpine Whitlow Grass" due to its small white flowers and grass-like foliage. The plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which may be used to treat various health issues. The herbal preparations of Draba oreadum subsp. oreadum include infusions and decoctions, which may be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, sore throats, and other respiratory issues, while also providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing.
